plugins.name: ditto
plugins.description: Intent / verification / completion harness for Claude Code (deep interview, autopilot graph, dialectic review, convergence gates). source="./" — the repo IS the plugin root for dev/self-host (claude --plugin-dir <repo>). The DEPLOY marketplace is generated at dist/plugin/.claude-plugin/marketplace.json by build:plugin and is what install registers (Claude Code bug #11278: a relative plugin subpath here would not resolve).
